allow:
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from src.storage.database import ThreatDatabase
from src.utils.config import load_config
cfg = load_config\(None\)
db = ThreatDatabase\(cfg.storage.db_path\)
db.initialize\(\)

# 新メソッドのテスト
items, total = db.search_items\(limit=5\)
print\(f'search_items: total={total}, returned={len\(items\)}'\)

trend = db.get_daily_trend\(days=30\)
print\(f'get_daily_trend: {len\(trend\)} days of data'\)

if items:
    first_id = items[0]['id']
    single = db.get_item_by_id\(first_id\)
    print\(f'get_item_by_id\({first_id}\): title={single[\\"title\\"][:40]}...'\)
    prev_id, next_id = db.get_adjacent_ids\(first_id\)
    print\(f'get_adjacent_ids: prev={prev_id}, next={next_id}'\)

db.close\(\)
print\('All DB methods OK'\)
")
